repo.description: The most widely used Python to C compiler
repo.name: cython

comment_data.body:
in MemoryView.pyx generic is declared as:
```cython
cdef generic = Enum(...)
```
This yields `generic` variables declared as `PyObject *` instead of `Enum` type. Hence, here we must use `object` type...
comment_data.diff_hunk:
@@ -47,6 +47,14 @@ cdef class array:
 @cname("__pyx_array_new")
 cdef array array_cwrapper(tuple shape, Py_ssize_t itemsize, char *format, const char *c_mode, char *buf)
 
+cdef object generic
